headline: Redresse-toi, sans douleur
body: Un soutien ergonomique qui aligne ta colonne vertébrale dès le premier porté.
image_prompt: Benefit-focused ad creative for Posture Corrector Pro. Hero image showing the main benefit: posture. Product prominently displayed. Clean layout with benefit headline: 'Redresse-toi, sans douleur'. Before/after visual subtle. Professional e-commerce style. Category: Health. Price: €30. Soft, aspirational mood.
